actions.description: Force-pushed rebased branch onto upstream main. Previous CI run (23284301554) was failing across all jobs due to SSH access denied for tloncorp/api-beta during pnpm install — infrastructure issue, not our change. Fresh CI triggered.

skipped.reason: CI all green, no review feedback

notes: openclaw PR #50301 had fully red CI from a stale run with infra-level pnpm SSH failure. Rebased onto fresh upstream/main and force-pushed; CI now re-running. block/goose PRs #7996 and #7888 both green, no action needed.
